review_checklist: Run: curl -s -X POST localhost:5050/api/quick-generate -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"prompt":"dramatic tiger","model":"gemini"}' — does it return success?
Run a model-shootout with 2+ models — do ALL models produce images, or do some silently fail?
Run agentic-generate with max_iterations=2 — does it complete both iterations without freezing?
Open localhost:5050 in browser — does the UI load and can you click Generate?
Would Drew be able to use this for 10 minutes without hitting an error?
notes: Must handle full iteration cycles without freezing
